artistry_dot_01.description: By adding your own artistic flourishes to an ordinary ob­ ject, you enable it to fulfill its purpose better: Painting a red stripe on a car makes it drive faster, giving a weapon a name makes it more effective, and so on. Whoever uses the item gains 2 Enhancement on appropriate rolls for the duration of the scene.
artistry_dot_01.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Scene
Subject: One object
Range: Close
Action: Simple

artistry_dot_02.description: No one can look away from your art. When you put on a performance, all affected targets in range that witnesses your performance cannot stop paying attention to you. If they wish to take another action, they must do it as a mixed action combined with an Integrity + Resolve roll at Difficulty 2. Putting on a performance with this Boon is a complex action that can last multiple rounds, but doesn't require a roll.
artistry_dot_02.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: All characters
Range: Medium
Action: Complex
Clash: Presence + Legend vs. Composure + Legend

artistry_dot_03.description: Once per session, when you use the Player Inspiration Stunt (Scion: Origin, p. 75) to discover a new fact about a clue, you can declare that it also has a hidden meaning appropriate to you or your Pantheon. For the duration of the episode, treat any Twist of Fate that you invoke as if you rolled 3 more successes, so long as it relates to this meaning.
artistry_dot_03.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: None
Duration: Episode
Subject: Self

artistry_dot_04.description: Your emotions overflow into the souls of your audience. wyrd_spin_the_thread.mechanicalEffects: Cost, Duration, Subject, Range, Action, and clash (if any) are printed in Scion: Hero for the Æsir Wyrd specialty ladder (Spin the Thread); confirm any cross-list with SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf at the table.

health_dot_01.description: Wounds, sickness, and old age are all temporary under your hands. For one scene, your eyes shine with a divine light, and you can remove any sickness, disease, or wounds from as many characters as you can touch. You may end any Con­ dition or Complication affecting a target and may heal any lost Health on a Storyguide character. If you instead focus all of your might on only one target, you may remove 1 Divine…
health_dot_01.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Subject: Any targets in short range
Range: Short
Action: Simple

health_dot_02.description: Ask the Storyguide one of the following questions: What's wrong with this person, and how could I help them? What were this person's last moments like? How can I end this [disease outbreak, mass poisoning, or similar crisis]? Who is responsible for this harm? Following the Storyguide's answer grants Enhancement 3 on applicable rolls.
health_dot_02.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Subject: Self
Action: Simple

health_dot_03.description: Touching a character, you heal their wounds. This Boon can be used to instantly resolve any Injury Condition a target suffers from, even Maimed Conditions. You can also use this Boon to resolve Conditions such as Poisoned, Disease, or similar ailments of physical or mental health, even if they are inflicted by magic.
health_dot_03.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Spend 1 Legend
Duration: Instant
Subject: One character
Range: Close
Action: Simple

health_dot_04.description: You can withhold the benefits of Health from your foes, magically inflicting disease upon them. This imposes both a +5 disease Complication and the Divine Plague Condition. Until the Condition is resolved with magical healing, the target cannot buy off the Complication or have it treated mundanely. A mortal target who fails to resolve the Condi­ tion within (12 − Legend) months suffers automatic death.
health_dot_04.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Spend 1 Legend
Duration: Condition
Subject: One character
Range: Medium
Action: Simple

health_dot_05.description: Sometimes you want an opponent to relive an old wound. By touching a target, you cause previously healed wounds to return, inflicting an Injury Condition equal to your Leg­ end/2 (rounded up). When used against characters of equal or greater Tier, this cannot exceed the margin of victory in a Clash of Wills. Spend 1 additional Legend to affect multiple targets. A single target can only gain one Injury Condition.
health_dot_05.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Spend 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: One character
Range: Close
Action: Simple
Clash: Legend + Cunning vs. Legend + Stamina

health_dot_06.description: Death is not eternal. It is something that can be temporary, as long as your healing touch does not come too late. You may focus on a character other than yourself that has been Taken Out for no longer than one scene in the same area that they died in and may rip them from the Underworld even if their body has been completely destroyed. The character is instantly restored fully back to life with no injuries or…
health_dot_06.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Instant
Subject: 1 character
Range: Short
Action: Simple

health_dot_07.description: You touch your target and mingle your life force with theirs, for good or ill. When you touch your target, can choose to do one of the following. To impart these effects during combat, you must touch your enemy with an unarmed combat attack and choose this Boon instead of normal Stunts. Any Conditions imparted by this Boon resolve when you reclaim your Awareness, or the Condition resolves normally. Transfer an…
health_dot_07.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Awareness
Duration: Condition (see below)
Subject: One character
Range: Close
Action: Reflexive
Clash: Awareness + Intelligence vs. Stamina + Legend

health_dot_08.description: Many don't consider that the other side of health is pestilence. With your divine wrath, you can send a plague to a city or town. The success of the plague is determined by rolling Med­ icine + Intellect (Difficulty 3). Tier 1 characters suffer the dis­ ease automatically. Tier 2 characters receive a Complication that they need to overcome or suffer the disease and receive a −1 to their Stamina. Tier 3 characters…
health_dot_08.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: 1 Act
Subject: City
Range: Long
Action: Simple

journeys_dot_01.description: You imbue a vehicle with divine power, raising the Scale of all speed-based actions taken with it by 1. Opposing characters that try to steal, damage, or otherwise impede your chosen char­ iot face a +2 Complication.
journeys_dot_01.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Subject: One vehicle
Range: Close
Action: Reflexive

journeys_dot_02.description: When you activate this Boon, you become anchored to your current location. At any point in the future, you may spend an action to open a door, window, or similar portal and cause it to lead back to the anchored location, allowing people and objects through — although only in one direc­ tion. The portal remains active until it's either closed on one end (such as by shutting an enchanted door), you open a new…
journeys_dot_02.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: Self or one character
Action: Simple

journeys_dot_03.description: You create an invisible pocket of space around yourself that is visually identical to the area in which it was creat­ ed, but exists outside of it and offers protection from both environmental harm and outside intrusion. If, for example, you used this Boon in Niflheim, it would still resemble an icy landscape, but the cold would have no effect and ice giants could not perceive or enter it. Unique objects, wheth­…
journeys_dot_03.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: All characters in range
Range: Short
Action: Reflexive
Clash: Intellect + Legend vs. Cunning + Legend

journeys_dot_04.description: You can find your destination effortlessly when taking an unknown path. When traveling an unknown route without the aid of GPS, maps, or other tools you ignore up to 2 Complications or reduce the difficulty by 1 to navigate dif­ ficult or dangerous terrain. You can imbue another Legend to guide additional characters and confer the same benefit on them. Anyone you're not guiding finds the effects of difficult or…
journeys_dot_04.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One journey
Subject: Self
Action: Simple

journeys_dot_05.description: You strew obstacles before an enemy's path. Any time they roll to travel or navigate, the Storyguide inflicts a +3 Com­ plication on the roll — parades in the way of their morning drive, flights delayed by mechanical troubles, and so on. If the character is attempting to move across difficult terrain that already exists, your curse also increases the difficulty of their movement actions by +1.
journeys_dot_05.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: One character
Range: Medium
Action: Simple

journeys_dot_06.description: You turn a single field into a labyrinth of which there is no escape. All directions lead back to the center, all turns lead back in, and all attempts to escape just leave people con­ founded and confused. People can enter the field without problems; they just can't leave until the Boon's effect ends. If the victim has an ability that allows them to never get lost, it provokes a Clash of Wills.
journeys_dot_06.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Awareness
Duration: One scene
Subject: One field
Range: Medium
Action: Simple

journeys_dot_07.description: Your travels are marked by hospitality, and you can always find safety, comfort, and refuge within as little as five minutes of searching — in Buenos Aires, an elderly couple will invite you in from the rain; on the Russian steppes, you'll stumble upon fuel for a fire and a safe den of rock. Trivial characters can't find you unless you want them to, and you gain +3 Enhancement to hide from or fight off…
journeys_dot_07.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: Self or one character
Action: Simple

journeys_dot_08.description: With a burning gaze, split yourself from the skein of time and fate. You generate up to your Legend divided by two, rounded down, clones within range. You and these clones are glitchy, flickering and fading, but they are physical and can attract attention. These clones move on your turn and can only perform a single simple action. Afterwards, they fragment, fracture, and then shatter.
journeys_dot_08.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Spend 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Range: Close
Action: Simple

journeys_dot_09.description: You command the Last Train Out of Here (Realms of Magic and Mystery, p. 40) to provide transit, opening a door into the strange place rather than wherever it would usually lead to. Until the door closes or the end of the scene, it leads into the Last Train's interior, and anyone who passes through will end up in the locomotive. This Boon doesn't help get out of the Last Train again, however; passengers are still…
journeys_dot_09.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Spend 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Subject: One doorway
Range: Close
Action: Simple

journeys_dot_10.description: You can negate a single Complication that obstructs your travel. Locked doors open at a touch, traffic parts around your car, and rough patches of turbulence disperse as the plane you're on flies through them. This benefits not only you, but any other character traveling with you.
journeys_dot_10.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Range: Medium
Action: Reflexive

journeys_dot_11.description: Things get topsy-turvy as you twist the normal pattern of exit-and-entrance. When used on a location, this Boon turns it into a labyrinth where doors lead to the wrong places, inflicting a +3 Complication to any attempts to navigate the space; if not bought off, characters bumble around for minutes or hours trying to get their bearings first. Trivial characters are utterly lost and can't escape at all unless led…
journeys_dot_11.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: One character or location
Range: Medium
Action: Simple
Clash: Manipulation + Legend vs. Cunning + Legend

journeys_dot_12.description: Where mere mortals must steal scraps of divine power to channel their magical might, yours flows freely from within you. For the rest of the scene, you gain Enhancement 3 on any Sorcery roll to perform spells that are related to any other Purview you have.
journeys_dot_12.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Subject: Self
Action: Simple

moon_dot_01.description: You create a wave of moonlight that fills all spaces within range. Anyone caught in the light begins to hallucinate. These hallucinations are based on their own knowledge and experiences but are twisted and strange. It becomes impossible to discern truth from lies, or hallucination from reality. This serves as a Condition in which the characters have +2 Complication to discern fact from fiction, truth from lies,…
moon_dot_01.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Awareness
Duration: Condition
Subject: All characters
Range: Short
Action: Simple
Clash: Awareness + Manipulation vs. Resolve + Legend

moon_dot_02.description: Cast in the light of the moon, things that once seemed famil­ iar take on new meanings and reveal hidden beauty. The target of this Boon reconsiders their feelings for someone or something they see, gaining Attitude 2 towards the designated person or thing, or changing the rating of an existing Attitude by +2 or −2. The target's player chooses the exact nature of their change of heart — this Boon simply forces…
moon_dot_02.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: One character
Range: Medium
Action: Simple
Clash: Manipulation + Legend vs. Resolve + Legend.

moon_dot_03.description: There are times when you need a place to wait out and hide. The Lunar Palace is perfect for just that. You have a house, estate, or palace that remains hidden from both mortal and immortal sight for the daylit hours and most of the moonlit hours. This acts as a safe house where you can invite others for respite. When choosing Lunar Palace, you must pick a phase of the moon when your Lunar Palace is visible (such…
moon_dot_03.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Range: Short
Action: Simple

moon_dot_04.description: While looking at the moon, you can view an area within the World the moonlight touches. You must specify the location, such as a specific intersection, monument, or place of inter­ est where the moon has risen. You view the scene from an overhead angle at long range — as the moon's view of the location would be. By imbuing additional Legend your view zooms in by one range band or follows a target moving through…
moon_dot_04.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One Scene
Subject: One Field
Range: Special
Action: Complex

moon_dot_05.description: The shadows of night and the light of the moon can trans­ form what you see, making you believe something other than reality. With Moon's Shadow, you can change up to 5 characters to appear as something other than they are. They still have to have the same general size and shape, but within those borders you can change how they look to others. In order to see through this disguise, a character must make an…
moon_dot_05.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Variable
Duration: One scene
Subject: 5 characters
Range: Short
Action: Simple

moon_dot_06.description: You vanish into ephemeral darkness, becoming completely invisible. You have Enhancement 3 to avoid being seen. This applies against electronic surveillance and even magical scrying based on sight.
moon_dot_06.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Subject: Self
Action: Simple

moon_dot_07.description: Within the World, there are supernatural forces at work. They can affect how someone acts or feels or can even turn someone's motives into their own. You can remove the mental influence of supernatural forces simply by touch. When using Purification on a single target, you can sever any magically created attitudes and social bonds, as well as any Complications or Conditions based on social inter­ actions or emotions.
moon_dot_07.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Subject: 1 character
Range: Short
Action: Simple

moon_dot_08.description: Drawing on symbolic ties between the waxing and waning of the moon and the cycle of human age, you transform your appearance or someone else's. You may change their apparent age, making them seem younger or older as you choose. This does not physically age the target's body, although they may face age-based Complications on Social actions. If you use this Boon on yourself, you gain a bonus on rolls with a…
moon_dot_08.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Free or Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: Self or one character
Range: Short
Action: Simple

order_dot_01.description: When you explain laws to people, as long as you're truth­ ful and accurate, they know that you are correct. If, as part of your explanation, you declare a person or group to be innocent, then the protection of this Purview's innate pow­ er extends to them for this Boon's duration. On the other hand, if you condemn someone as guilty, you and those who hear you have Enhancement 2 on any actions taken to bring them…
order_dot_01.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Subject: Self
Action: Simple

order_dot_02.description: You anoint yourself or another character as divinely proclaimed sovereign, making all who look upon them see proof of their immanent authority. All characters treat their Attitude towards the sovereign as 1 point higher. This doesn't stack with other magical Attitude bonuses. In addi­ tion, for the purpose of Order Boons and marvels that care, such as Code of Heaven, it is unlawful to harm or betray the sovereign.
order_dot_02.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Subject: Self or one character
Range: Close
Action: Simple

order_dot_03.description: The normal laws of the land don't apply to you anymore. For the duration of this Boon, there is a single law, either civilian or of physics that no longer applies to you. If you break this law, those who would normally oversee dealing with it simply ignore you and let you pass. This can't apply to a law or rule you broke before the Boon was activated; it must happen while the Boon is active. Once the Boon ends,…
order_dot_03.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Awareness
Duration: One scene
Subject: Self
Action: Reflexive

order_dot_04.description: What's legal isn't always what's right. Once per session you declare a mortal law immoral and unenforceable, and any character of a lower Tier who hears the declaration does not act against law breakers. The law in question must repress society such as restrictions on bodily autonomy, discrimina­ tory laws, etc., resulting in the suspension of the law granting personal freedom. This Boon cannot be used to remove…
order_dot_04.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: All characters within range
Range: Medium
Action: Simple/Complex

order_dot_05.description: Your will dictates what is and is not law. Any Tier 1 charac­ ters who are part of order, including judges, police forces, military, etc., will listen to whatever short command you give and treat it as law as long as they are within hearing range. While following your will, they receive a +1 En­ hancement to any actions they take that falls in line with carrying out your orders. Any Tier 3 characters may try to…
order_dot_05.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Variable
Duration: One scene
Subject: Other characters
Range: Medium
Action: Simple

order_dot_06.description: Your imposing presence strikes divine terror into the hearts of liars. An affected character can't lie, omit the truth, or make any misrepresentation of a material fact, and consequently never imposes a misleading Complication on any information they give.
order_dot_06.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: One character
Range: Short
Action: Simple
Clash: Presence + Legend vs. Manipulation + Legend

order_dot_07.description: You see chaos and see how to make it structured once more. You can take something seemingly disordered, such as a pile of bricks or twisted metal, and create something orderly, such as a bridge or a fence, in mere minutes. You are limit­ ed by the materials you have in terms of what you create. However, your creation is something that will endure as any structure of its type would under normal circumstances.…
order_dot_07.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Variable
Duration: Indefinite
Range: Short
Action: Simple

order_dot_08.description: You are able to see the patterns that others would not, cre­ ating order from seemingly random actions. Whenever you are presented with a crime scene or other evidence, you are able to extrapolate what exactly happened and why it may have happened. While this may make you the perfect detective, there are times when you may be trying to parse apart the actions of a more chaotic supernatural being. When that…
order_dot_08.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Range: Short
Action: Simple
Clash: Empathy + Legend vs. Subterfuge + Legend

order_dot_09.description: Emotions run deep, and with your help they spread to everyone in the area. The strongest emotion — positive or negative —any character in the Field feels leaks out and spreads to others. Affected characters gain the emotion at 1 less intensity than the original target. Characters of an equal or higher Tier to you are unaffected if they win a Clash of Wills. If two or more characters tie for the strongest emotion,…
order_dot_09.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Scene
Subject: Location
Range: Medium
Action: Simple
Clash: Presence + Legend vs Composure + Legend

passion_dot_02.description: You curse your target with impotence regarding the object of their desire. They gain the Impotence Condition, which inflicts +2 Complication to act on their desire for a particular person, whether it's confessing their passion, taking action to fulfill it, or doing something on their behalf. Failure to buy off the Complication results in awkwardness and one of the following results: the object of the target's…
passion_dot_02.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Spend 1 Legend
Duration: Condition
Subject: One character
Range: Short
Action: Simple

passion_dot_03.description: You fill a character's heart with an emotion of your choice. They gain a Condition based on that emotion — Mad as Hell, Lovestruck, Too Sad to Function, or something similar. The exact effect of the Condition may vary based on the chosen emotion, but as a generic effect, the target takes +3 Difficulty when they take an action that the Storyguide deems is directly contrary to the emotion — it's hard to treat…
passion_dot_03.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Condition
Subject: One character
Range: Medium
Action: Simple

passion_dot_04.description: You sap someone's passions, leaving them feeling empty and hollow inside. Your victim gains a Condition in which they cannot feel strong emotions about anything. Attempts to incite emotion from the character suffer a +2 Compli­ cation. The person does not gain any benefits from their Bonds for the duration of the Condition, and all actions that would need emotion to work such as persuasive speech, or lending…
passion_dot_04.mechanicalEffects:

passion_dot_05.description: You overwhelm a character with a sudden burst of emotion. They exclaim without realizing it, unwittingly vocalizing whatever they are thinking. Everyone who hears it gains Enhancement 3 on Assess Attitude actions or other Social rolls to understand the utterance's context for the duration of the Boon.
passion_dot_05.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Subject: One character
Range: Short
Action: Simple
Clash: Presence + Legend vs. Composure + Legend

passion_dot_06.description: You mellow out someone's hot temper and put their priori­ ties on the backburner. As long as you and your Band don't pose them immediate danger, they're unwilling to interfere in your business. They might not automatically let you rummage through their personal files, but they set their Attitude toward you and your Band to 0, making them open to deals. Against trivial targets, this Boon can affect a handful of…
passion_dot_06.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Scene
Subject: One character
Range: Medium
Action: Simple
Clash: Manipulation + Legend vs Composure + Legend

passion_dot_07.description: You inflict your target with a frenzied passion for violence that puts them in harm's way. For the scene, the target suffers a +2 Complication on all action-adventure rolls. Failure to buy off the Complication leads to one of the following: The target suffers an Injury Condition resulting from an eager mistake; falls into a vulnerable position, granting +1 En­ hancement to any enemies attempting to strike him…
passion_dot_07.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Spend 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Subject: One character
Range: Short
Action: Simple

passion_dot_08.description: You bless your target's passion to fortify them against any obstacle. They gain one of the following benefits as long as they are acting in pursuit of the blessed passion: an ad­ ditional Bruised Condition, a +3 Enhancement to endure hardship, or an extra interval on a relevant complex action. While the target can be Taken Out during the scene, they cannot be killed, as their passion ensures they'll survive until…
passion_dot_08.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Spend 1 Legend
Duration: One scene
Subject: One character
Range: Long
Action: Simple

passion_dot_09.description: Once you have identified a character's Attitude towards you or someone else, you can either intensify or stifle the emotions from which it is derived, raising or lowering its value by 1 point. This doesn't stack with other magical Attitude modifiers, but can cancel out an opposing bonus or penalty. Boons 257

Subject: One character
Range: Long
Action: Reflexive

prosperity_dot_01.description: You never have to worry about your wealth or gifts going unnoticed. You can use this Boon on either a luxury good that you've bought this session, like an elegant necklace or brand-new SUV, or an object or locale that you have either concretely or symbolically dedicated to a group of people, like a shrine built for your cult or a shopping mall you've cut the ribbon to. The blessed object or location catches the…
prosperity_dot_01.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: One session
Subject: One object or location
Range: Close
Action: Simple

prosperity_dot_02.description: You call forth wealth, conjuring up roughly $10,000 worth of riches (though you don't need to bother keeping track of precise sums). This wealth takes the form of your choosing: a fresh wad of $100 bills in your wallet, coins of precious metal minted with your divine parent's visage, a discreet de­ posit into your online bank account, or similar. Regardless of the form it takes, money conjured with this Boon…
prosperity_dot_02.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Spend 1 Legend
Duration: Instant
Action: Simple

prosperity_dot_03.description: You curse a character's fortunes with notoriety and suspi­ cion, marking them as a cheat or crook. They suffer a +3 Complication on any rolls based on their finances, whether brokering deals, managing business operations, or blend­ ing in with the social mores of the 1%. Unless bought off, these actions become hopelessly bogged down by legal complications or scandal, making every transaction a subject of public…
prosperity_dot_03.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: One character
Range: Medium
Action: Simple
Clash: Intellect + Legend vs. Resolve + Legend

prosperity_dot_04.description: You give your blessing to a specific group of mortals that belong to an organization or live in the same place, such as the employees of a business, the members of your cult, or the populace of a city. Your benevolence wards away economic misfortune, negating any mundane Conditions that arise from poverty or stabilizing larger-scale econo­ mies. A blessing on a city's homeless population ensures they will…
prosperity_dot_04.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: One group or city
Range: Long
Action: Simple

prosperity_dot_05.description: You fill someone with an insatiable desire — be it for food, wealth, or worldly objects. This Boon confers a Condition on the target that makes the character seek out whatever she desires. People take notice of her desire, and find it disgusting, imposing a +2 Complication to all social ac­ tions. The character is obsessed with her desire, suffering a +2 Complication to take actions that don't further her goal…
prosperity_dot_05.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Awareness
Duration: Condition
Subject: One character
Range: Medium
Action: Simple
Clash: Awareness + Presence vs. Composure + Legend

prosperity_dot_06.description: You automatically know when anyone in a scene pays off someone else, whether it's in cash, goods, or favors. Once per scene, ask the Storyguide one of these questions about a present character: What kind of debts does this character owe, and to whom? What would it cost for this character to do what I'd like? What does this character want from me? If you act on the Storyguide's answers, you gain +3 Enhancement.
prosperity_dot_06.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: Self
Action: Reflexive

prosperity_dot_07.description: You curse a character so that a touch of their hands trans­ forms objects into a precious material of your choice. Gold's the standard, but you could go with silver, electrum, diamond — whatever, as long as it's pretty, desirable, and not super useful on its own. This is a Condition that presents logistical challenges to any action with their hands: Steering wheels lock into place, phones become useless bricks,…
prosperity_dot_07.mechanicalEffects:
Cost: Imbue 1 Legend
Duration: Indefinite
Subject: One character
Range: Short
Action: Simple

prosperity_dot_08.description: You truly shine when your detractors are there to see your successes. You gain +1 Enhancement for each character present who has a negative attitude toward you, for the du­ ration of the scene. Each hater gains a Complication equal to their attitude on any actions to oppose you. Failure to buy off the Complication gives you an added Enhance­ ment on your next action.
prosperity_dot_08.mechanicalEffects:

prosperity_dot_09.description: You truly shine when your detractors are there to see your successes.
